_note: DhanHQ requires securityId (not ticker) for order placement. Populate this map as tickets are traded. Lookup sources: Dhan scrip master CSV (https://images.dhan.co/api-data/api-scrip-master.csv) or /v2/securities/search. Keep in git as cache.
